task_objective: Revise automatic sync status strip messaging so lifecycle checks show verifying copy before restore or backup action copy, using Steam-like save sync language.
tests_added: Backend tests for check_game_start, restore_game_on_start, check_game_exit, and backup_game_on_exit
Main RPC bridge test for split lifecycle check/action methods
Frontend static tests for Steam-like status text and no premature action status publishing
design_decisions: Split autosync lifecycle into check and action RPCs while preserving handle_game_start and handle_game_exit compatibility wrappers.

Map checking to VERIFYING GAME SAVE, restore action to DOWNLOADING SAVE..., backup action to UPLOADING SAVE..., success/current to GAME SAVE UP TO DATE, unknown skip states to UNKNOWN, and unsafe failures to UNABLE TO SYNC.
Keep BrowserView geometry, timers, failure toasts, and notification preferences behavior unchanged.
